mission: Set up your environment and complete one ritual across all five departments.
managerBrief: Day 1 is calibration, not volume. Finish small, finish clean, and build the habit of submitting a complete day.

departments.name: Learn
departments.description: Study, courses, notes, and structured practice.

tasks.title: Read: Modern React patterns
tasks.description: Skim hooks-first patterns and take three notes.

tasks.title: Watch: TypeScript in 100 minutes
tasks.description: Watch the intro talk end to end.

tasks.title: Scaffold portfolio repo
tasks.description: Create the repo, install deps, run the dev server.

tasks.title: Push initial commit
tasks.description: Conventional commit message. Push to main.

tasks.title: Write a 150-word intro post
tasks.description: What you're building and why, in your own voice.

tasks.title: Update LinkedIn headline
tasks.description: State what you do and what you're becoming.

tasks.title: Send one outreach message
tasks.description: One thoughtful message to a target engineer.

departments.name: Operate
departments.description: Health, recovery, focus, and performance inputs.

tasks.title: Log today's health metrics
tasks.description: Fill in steps, sleep, study hours, and coding hours.
